summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bare Force One LLC iteration 5 features - new blog/insights functionality, auto-reply emails, and sitemap updates. All new features working correctly.

design_issues.issue: Expected '50+' stat not found on homepage - may need to verify if this stat should be present

passed_tests: Contact form submission works with auto-reply emails
Request proposal form submission works with auto-reply emails
All backend form validation working (empty fields, invalid emails rejected)
/insights page loads with 4 blog article cards (Government, Enterprise, Cloud & Security, Local Business)
All 4 individual blog articles load with full content and back links
Blog article CTA 'Request Proposal' links work correctly
Navbar shows 'Insights' link and highlights correctly when active
Footer shows 'Insights' link in Company section
Homepage loads with hero, capabilities, testimonials, and CTA buttons
Form submissions successfully trigger auto-reply emails (per backend implementation)
